title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. lingulatum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. lingulatum, also known as the rough hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. lingulatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. lingulatum often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
